blocks.content: March. The rest of the letters came in. Eli's state school, confirmed. Savannah's school in Nashville, confirmed. Marcus — community college local, which he said with more peace than anyone expected.
At lunch it became a different kind of conversation.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: We should do a trip. Before August. All of us.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Somewhere. Doesn't matter. Just — the five of us, somewhere that isn't Millhaven.
Kit looked at Daisy across the table. She was already looking at him.
Eli beamed. Savannah started talking logistics. Marcus ate his lunch. Kit and Daisy went back to their trays but the look stayed with him.
It had always been like that.
eli is already texting about the trip
hes been planning it in his head since september
yeah. just thinking about how fast its going
you're right. im sorry. you doing okay
